    Modifier and Type Constant Field Value
    static final java.lang.String ACTION_LABEL_PATTERN "[a-z][A-Za-z0-9_]*"
    static final java.lang.String BRACE_PATTERN "\\{|\\}"
    static final java.lang.String BRACKET_PATTERN "\\[|\\]"
    static final java.lang.String COMMENT_PATTERN "\\/\\/[^\n]*"
    static final java.lang.String IDENT_PATTERN "[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*\\*?"
    static final java.lang.String INT_PATTERN "[0-9]+"
    static final java.lang.String OPERATIONS "~|#"
    static final java.lang.String OPERATORS "\\|\\||\\||&&|&|\\^|==|=|!=|<<|<=|<|>>|>=|>|\\+|-|\\*|\\/|%|!|\\?"
    static final java.lang.String PAREN_PATTERN "\\(|\\)"
    static final java.lang.String SYMBOLS "\\.\\.|\\.|,|:|\\[|\\]|\\(|\\)|->|~>|\\\\|@|\\$|\\?"
